name: HWM IoT Magnetic Water Meter
desc: IoT magnetic impeller water meter, NB-IoT/4G, anti-magnetic, IP68 three-chamber, 6+ year battery, optional IC card recharge.
overview: The HWM Series IoT Magnetic Water Meter uses a new-generation microprocessor to acquire and record water flow continuously, then transmit data to the management platform via NB-IoT / 4G for remote billing. Epoxy-moulded magnetic anti-tamper pin design resists external interference. Supports two-way communication for remote valve control and parameter setting.
features: NB-IoT/4G automatic reading eliminates manual meter-reading visits; stable, two-way communication
Dynamic network maintenance: system auto-maintains at regular intervals without manual adjustment
Waterproof epoxy-encapsulated circuit with anti-magnetic ring design; IP68 rated
Smart scheduled reading: configurable thresholds and active alerts for abnormal water usage
Real-time monitoring: triggers alarms for overflow, backflow, slow leak, and other abnormal flow events
Epoxy-moulded anti-tamper pin resists external magnet attacks; multiple body material options available
